_comments.mode: Must be 'edge' for Edge device deployments
_comments.centralApiUrl: GreenReach Central production URL (no trailing slash)
_comments.syncInterval: Milliseconds between full sync attempts (default: 5 minutes)
_comments.syncEnabled: MUST be boolean true (not string) to enable sync
_comments.registrationComplete: Set to true after initial farm registration
_comments.offlineMode: Set to false to allow syncing

_security.api_key_rotation: Rotate API key every 90 days or on suspected compromise

_validation_rules.apiKey: Must start with 'FARM-' and contain 96+ characters
_validation_rules.centralApiUrl: Must be valid HTTPS URL (Edge devices require TLS)
